description.unified: Deals damage to enemies within range and stuns them for [5 sec->3 sec].

Engraves [Mark of Death] on all enemies for [30 sec->15 sec], dealing continuous Magic Damage. Enemies with [Mark of Death] take 25% increased Magic Damage, and if recast within 15 sec, the effect is increased by 20%. This effect stacks up to 5 times and cannot be dispelled.

Deals Magic Damage per second to all enemies for [15 sec->12 sec], recovers HP equal to [100%->130%] of damage dealt, and has a 10% chance to stun them for [1 sec->0.6 sec]. During the duration, all allies take [(added) 20%] reduced Physical Damage, and enemies with [Mark of Death] take additional Magic Damage.

Increases all allies’ Physical Defense. When taking damage that would be fatal, enters [Coffin] state for 5 sec, restoring HP. While in [Coffin] state, Attack Speed changes do not affect you, you are immune to all damage, and deal Magic Damage equal to 5% of Max HP per second to nearby enemies.

light.unified: Recovers HP equal to 50% of damage dealt.

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], but pulls the target to your vicinity with a 100% success rate.

light.unified: Debuff duration is reduced to 10 sec, but damage is increased by [250%->500%].

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by [(added) 1000], but cooldown is reduced by 7 sec.
When the effect triggers, stuns all enemies for [2 sec->1.2 sec].

description.unified: [Funeral Rites] reduces the target’s CC Resist by [250->400] and Magic Block chance by {0} for [10 sec->4 sec].
[Mark of Death] When a marked enemy dies, increases own ATK by 5% and Crit DMG by {0}% for 20 sec. Stacks up to [8->16] times.
[Day of Ruin] increases DMG by {0}% and reduces the target’s M.DEF by [5%->3%] for 5 sec each time damage is dealt. This effect can stack up to 10 times.
[Rest in Peace] reduces all DMG taken by {0}% for 10 sec after use. Cooldown set to [(added) 40 sec].

Deals Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power per second to nearby enemies, reduces their Attack by {1}%, and recovers HP equal to [(added) 75%] of damage dealt. The [1->4] allies with the highest Attack (excluding yourself) deal {2}% increased damage to non-hero enemies. This effect cannot be dispelled.
